name: Generic_Watch_Channel

simple_types.name: Watch_Channel
simple_types.code: type Watch_Channel (Max_Subscribers : Positive := 64) is limited private;

subprograms.name: Close
subprograms.code:
function Close
  (Channel : in out Watch_Channel;
   Reason  : String := "watch channel closed")
   return Aion.Sync.Boolean_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Current
subprograms.code:
function Current
  (Channel : in out Watch_Channel) return Message_Results.Result_Type

subprograms.name: Initialize
Publish
Receive_Changed
Subscribe
subprograms.code:
function Subscribe
  (Channel : in out Watch_Channel) return Subscriber_Results.Result_Type
